leadText: Lumina Crash (Japanese: ルミナコリジョン Lumina Collision) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Espathra.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Lumina Crash inflicts damage and lowers the target's Special Defense by two stages.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.
